product_name: Gyeon Q²m Leatherset Strong Güçlü Deri Temizlik ve Bakım Seti (5 Parça) - 200 ml

sources.cleaned_content:
Q²M LEATHERSET STRONG

Interior / maintenance

Complete leather maintenance set for used and dirty leather.

Q²M LeatherSet Strong offers a comprehensive solution for cleaning and protecting heavily used or dirty automotive leather. It combines Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong with Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED, enabling deep cleaning and long-lasting protection in a single step, aided by all the necessary accessories included.

Product Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_leather-cleaner-strong_box_2023-1024x991.png

Complete leather maintenance set for used and dirty leather.

Q²M LeatherSet Strong restores heavily soiled leather by pairing intensive cleaning with long lasting protection. It prepares the surface correctly, removes dirt and oily residue, and applies a protective layer that simplifies future maintenance.

Benefits:
- QUICK AND EFFECTIVE
- REMOVES DIRT AND STAINS
- STRONG CLEANING ACTION

TECHNICAL DETAILS

Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mleathersetstrong.webp

BOX CONTAINS: Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong 200ml / Q² LeatherCoat 120ml / Q²M ScrubPad EVO / Q²M MF Applicator / microfibre

Consumption: 1set / 2-3 cars

HOW TO USE

01. Clean the leather using Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong and the included tools.
02. Remove loosened contamination with a microfibre towel.
03. Apply Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED evenly to the leather.
04. Allow the product to bond to the surface.
05. Let the leather dry before use.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

01. What is included in Q²M LeatherSet Strong?
LeatherCleaner Strong, LeatherCoat REDEFINED and application accessories.

02. When should this set be used?
For heavily used or dirty leather upholstery.

03. Does it leave the leather shiny?
No. It leaves a natural, matte finish.

04. How many cars can one set treat?
Around two to three vehicles.

05. Is it suitable for modern automotive leather?
Yes. It is designed for modern leather upholstery.

3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item

Leather Protection Kit

Q²M Leather Set Strong is the comprehensive solution that includes Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong, a potent pre-coating leather cleaner, and Q² LeatherCoat, creating the perfect combination for leather maintenance and protection. Q²M Leather Strong effectively removes deep dirt and oil residue, providing optimal preparation for coating. Q² LeatherCoat ensures a durable matte clean surface, facilitating easier future maintenance against contamination.

BOX CONTAINS: Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong 200ml / Q² LeatherCoat 120ml / Q²M LeatherBrush / Q²M MF Applicator / Microfiber

Images:
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-coat_4abe6e92-1509-468d-822a-a6bd153f577a.jpg?v=1702511106&width=1080
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-strong_3b51e21c-339c-452a-aadd-072c87f01784.jpg?v=1702511106&width=1080
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-strong-banner1.jpg?v=1702511106&width=2400
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-strong-banner2.jpg?v=1702511106&width=2400

Safe deep clean
Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong stands as the ultimate solution for cleaning and preparing leather upholstery for the application of a quartz coating. Free from softening additives and residue, it ensures no interference with the quality of the coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner provides a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather.

All in one solution
This complete set includes the new Q²M LeatherBrush, Q²M MF Applicator, MF Towel, and the innovative foam dispenser, ensuring more effective and easier application right out of the box. Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong removes dirt, oily residue, and provides optimal preparation for coating. Meanwhile, Q²M LeatherCoat ensures a long-lasting protective effect, simplifying future maintenance.

Tip: Don't hesitate to use water in conjunction with the Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong foam. This aids in distributing the product and generating more foam. The included Q²M LeatherBrush effectively agitates the cleaner, removing dirt from the material's structure.

GYEON Leather Set Strong

Q²M Leather Set Strong is the complete solution combining Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong, a powerful pre-coating leather cleaner and Q²M Leather Coat to achieve the ideal leather maintenance & protection solution. Q²M Leather Strong ensures the removal of deep dirt, oil residue and provides best preparation for coating. Q²M Leather Coat ensures a long lasting matte clean surface and makes future maintenance easier against contamination.

BOX CONTAINS: Q²M LEATHERCLEANER STRONG 200ML / Q² LEATHERCOAT 120ML / Q²M LEATHERBRUSH / Q²M MF APPLICATOR / MICROFIBRE

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN
Don't be afraid to use water along with the Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong foam. This will help you distribute the product and create more foam. The attached Q²M Leather Brush will agitate the cleaner and remove dirt from the structure of the material. TIP: Always use multiple microfibre towels. It's worth to wipe the leather with a damp towel once cleaning is done.

CONSUMPTION: 1set / 2-3 cars

ALL IN ONE
This full set comes with the brand new Q²M Leather Brush & Q²M MF Applicator as well as a MF Towel and the new foam dispenser, allowing more effective and easier application out of the box. Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong ensures the removal of dirt, oily residue and provides best preparation for coating. Q²M Leather Coat ensures a long lasting protective effect and makes future maintenance easier.

STRONG AND EFFECTIVE
Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong is the ultimate solution for cleaning and preparing leather upholstery for application of a quartz coating. It does not contain any softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with a quality coating. Q²M Leather Cleaner leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather.

FAQ

What's the different between GYEON Leather Shield and Leather Coat?
Leather Shield is a full-on leather ceramic coating, whereas Leather Coat is a water-based protection spray that's easy to use and can be used to maintain and top up Leather Shield.

Is it shiny?
No, both Cleaner and Leather Coat will give you a factory OEM matte finish.

How long does it last?
Leather Coat will last round 3 months per coat.

Does it work on dashboards?
Yes, it does. Not limited to leather or soft-touch material, Leather Coat & Cleaner can be used to coat plastics and vinyl as well.

What's the difference between Mild and Strong?
Mild is excellent for maintenance, while Strong can effectively remove leather protection products for a full strip and deep clean.

Gyeon Leather Cleaner Natural - 500 ml

- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Leather-Cleaner-Natural-500-ml_1843_1_lw_2515.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Leather-Cleaner-Natural-500-ml_1843_1_lw_2611.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Leather-Cleaner-Natural-500-ml_1843_1_lw_3947.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Leather-Cleaner-Natural-500-ml_1843_1_lw_4888.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Leather-Cleaner-Natural-500-ml_1843_1_lw_5523.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Leather-Cleaner-Natural-500-ml_1843_1_lw_6472.jpg

Available Sizes: 500 ml - $17.99

Quantity Discounts: 2+ units at $16.99 (6% savings)

Product Information:
- Safely clean your leather or vinyl surfaces!
- Helps prep leather for coating applications
- Does not contain any softening or preserving additives
- Product Code: GY-7802

Product Description:
The Gyeon Leather Cleaner Natural allows you to gently remove light contamination from your leather surfaces! Dirt, grime and light oily residue is no match for this unique formula. Leather Cleaner does not contain any softening or preserving additives and is safe on all modern types of leather. There are two cleaning options, strong and natural. Strong works best on heavily soiled leather surfaces, while natural is gentler and designed for maintenance cleanings. For added cleaning power, Gyeon recommends using the Gyeon Leather Brush as well. This high-quality formula also helps prep your leather if you want to apply a leather coating like Gyeon Leather Coat afterward. If you are looking to lightly clean or maintain your leather seats the Gyeon Leather Cleaner Natural should be your choice!

Cleaning Options:
- Leather Cleaner Strong - Designed to clean heavily soiled leather areas.
- Leather Cleaner Natural - Best suited for lightly soiled leather or as a maintenance cleaner.

From The Label:
Mild and safe, pH-neutral cleaner for all types of modern automotive leather, including nappa and semi-aniline upholstery.
- Perfect for daily use
- Safe on all types of leather
- Mild cleaning action

Directions:
Vacuum upholstery before cleaning. Spray on a small area and clean with Q2M LeatherBrush or Q2M ScrubPad. Remove dirt in a straight motion. Do not rub in with the microfibre. Wipe with a lightly damp cloth to remove excess of product. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

Customer Reviews:

Reviewed by Billy S. on 2/6/2022 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
I recommend the strong formula over the mild, not enough cleaning power. But for wipe down works perfect

Reviewed by Michael B. on 7/12/2021 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
I love this product! With white vegan leather seats in my Tesla it's either trust a quality product or you're doomed as there is no forgiveness on white. This product is up to the task. I have nothing but things to say. It cleans, doesn't leave a residue, and the seats aren't slippery after use. Two big thumbs up!!

Reviewed by Nicholas C. on 3/11/2019 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Excellent product - as effective as a Leatherique treatment at a fraction of the cost and time involved. So far I've used it on two minivans with a good bit of grime on the front seats. It's much more effective than Meguiar's APC as well; one application with a horsehair brush did as well as three applications of APC. It foams up well with brush agitation, but two wipes with a damp cloth took care of any residue.
Pros: Mild scent, very effective, foams well, wipes off easily
Cons: Wish it came in gallon or 4l

Gyeon Q2M Leather Set Natural

Brand: Gyeon
Sale price: £29.13
Stock: In stock
Pickup available at Newcastle - Usually ready in 2 hours

Product Image: //www.mycarcleaning.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/set-leather-cleaner-natural-1500.jpg?v=1749258989&width=1500

Q²M LEATHERCLEANER NATURAL

Mild leather cleaner dedicated for semi-aniline and nappa leather

Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is a safe, ph-neutral cleaner for all types of modern automotive leather. We designed it especially for luxury and sports cars' delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery. Of course, it is also suitable for any other type of modern leather upholstery. It is the ultimate leather preparation product for use before a coating application, developed along with Gyeon's high-end Q² LeatherShield EVO & Q² LeatherCoat redefined. It removes light dirt, oily residue and even light discolouration. Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula does not include softening or preserving additives, leaving a surface ready for coating.

Gentle clean for any type of leather
Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is the perfect solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. It does not contain any softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with a quality ceramic coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather. It might also be used on coated leather, not removing the coating and gently cleansing the surface.

Best practice and pro-tips from Yves Heylen
Always vacuum the upholstery first. Use Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural, along with water, to increase the foam and help distribute the cleaner. Use the Q²M ScrubPad EVO. Work in sections. TIP: Always remove dirt with a microfibre in a straight motion. Use at least 3 towels: for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds and another one to dry the surface.

Consumption: 100ml/car
